items.name: Chicken Tenders Dinner
items.description: Premium golden-fried chicken tenders served with choice of dipping sauce. Served with your choice of two sides and dinner bread after existing description.
items.simplified_description: Fried chicken tenders with dipping sauce, two sides, and dinner bread.

items.name: Crazy Spicy Sizzlin’ Skillet
items.description: Crumbled chorizo sausage, fire-roasted bell peppers and onions, mushrooms, jalapenos, and seasoned red potatoes. Topped with grilled seasoned chicken breast, shredded cheddar cheese blend, a spicy five pepper sauce, and pepper jack queso.
items.simplified_description: Spicy skillet with chorizo, chicken, veggies, cheese, and seasoned potatoes.

items.name: Cali Club Sandwich
items.description: Turkey breast, ham, bacon, Swiss cheese, fresh avocado, mayo, lettuce and tomato on toasted multigrain bread.
items.simplified_description: Sandwich with turkey, ham, bacon, cheese, avocado, and veggies on multigrain bread.

items.name: Ultimate Omelette®
items.description: Three-egg omelette with crumbled sausage, bacon, fire‑roasted bell peppers & onions, sautéed mushrooms, tomatoes and cheddar cheese blend, served with hash browns and your choice of toast.
items.simplified_description: Three-egg omelette with sausage, bacon, veggies, cheese, hash browns, and toast.

items.name: Berry Waffle Slam
items.description: Two sweet Liège-style waffles made with real butter and pearl sugar, topped with seasonal berries and caramel sauce. Served with two eggs made to order, two bacon strips and two all-pork sausage links.
items.simplified_description: Sweet waffles with berries and caramel, plus eggs, bacon, and sausage.

items.name: Grilled Shrimp Tropical Bowl
items.description: Grilled shrimp, fresh mango salsa, sweet chili sauce, whole grain rice, broccoli, sweet corn, marinated red cabbage, fresh avocado, cucumber and spinach, sprinkled with white sesame seeds.
items.simplified_description: Shrimp bowl with mango salsa, veggies, rice, and sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Crispy Teriyaki Tofu Tropical Bowl
items.description: Crispy teriyaki tofu bites, fresh mango salsa, sweet chili sauce, whole grain rice, broccoli, sweet corn, marinated red cabbage, fresh avocado, cucumber and spinach, sprinkled with white sesame seeds.
items.simplified_description: Tofu bowl with mango salsa, veggies, rice, and sweet chili sauce.
